description: Minimum Operator Surface (MOS) — the Next.js read-only Web app under presence/displays/operator-surface — is built and the no-write contract test passes.

capabilities.description: node_modules in presence/displays/operator-surface/ exists (i.e., `pnpm install` ran at least once after the latest workspace change).
MOS no-write-API contract test (mos.read-only audit) passes.

install.instruction: MOS must remain read-only. If this fails, the MOS code introduced a write API — review the diff and back it out, then re-bootstrap.

capabilities.description: When KYBERION_TENANT is set, MOS picks up the per-tenant view; for single-tenant deployments this is optional.

install.instruction: Set `KYBERION_TENANT=<tenant-slug>` to bind MOS to a tenant. Leave unset for single-tenant deployments.
